# Vendored: xterm.js

Vendored (not CDN) so the GUI works offline / FOSS-first.

- **xterm.js** `@xterm/xterm` **5.5.0** — `xterm.js`, `xterm.css`
- **fit addon** `@xterm/addon-fit` **0.10.0** — `addon-fit.js`
- **License:** MIT (Copyright (c) The xterm.js authors)
- **Source:** https://github.com/xtermjs/xterm.js (fetched via jsDelivr)

To update: re-fetch the same paths from `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@xterm/...`
at the desired version and bump the numbers above.
